envVars.name: AIONMARKET_API_KEY
envVars.description: Main AION API key for market search, context checks, and trading operations.

envVars.name: AION_API_KEY
envVars.description: Optional alias for platforms that standardize on AION_API_KEY instead of AIONMARKET_API_KEY.

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Polygon private key required for live Polymarket self-custody orders.

envVars.name: AIONMARKET_BASE_URL
envVars.description: Optional non-default AION backend URL when your environment documents one.

envVars.name: BUY_USD
envVars.description: Target USD notional for each buy cycle. Default: 1.0

envVars.name: HOLD_SECONDS
envVars.description: Seconds to hold the position before selling. Default: 300

envVars.name: MAX_BUYS
envVars.description: Number of buy cycles before the strategy stops. Default: 10

envVars.name: SEARCH_LIMIT
envVars.description: Number of BTC search results to inspect before selecting a target market. Default: 50

envVars.name: MARKET_PRICE_BUFFER
envVars.description: Price buffer used to form market-style FAK orders. Default: 0.03
